div.p: WPILib — HAL, wpimath, command-based the floor; every team builds on it
Vendor libraries — Phoenix 6 (CTRE), REVLib, PhotonVision / Limelight
IO implementations — ElevatorIOTalonFX, ... the one place vendor types are allowed
Subsystem logic · Superstructure · RobotState no vendor type; depends only on WPILib + the IO interface

g.text: plugged in via the IO interface
